segments.title: Triage of Duplicate Symbol Error in Production Build
segments.summary: Justin reports a recurring duplicate symbol error in the production build that is blocking deploys. After reproducing it locally, he identifies that Vite optimizer is inlining the server entry twice. The agreed solution is to mark the server entry as external in `vite.config`, gated by build mode, and to add a regression test.
actions: Justin: Mark server entry as external in `vite.config`
Justin: Add a regression test for the duplicate symbol error
decisions: Prioritize the hotfix over hydration issues.
Mark the server entry as external in `vite.config` for production builds to resolve the duplicate symbol error.
segments.retrieval_summary: Fix duplicate symbol error in production build by marking server entry as external in `vite.config`; Justin to add regression test.

segments.title: Hotfix Deployment Confirmation
segments.summary: Justin confirms that the fix has been pushed, CI is passing, and the staging deployment is clean. Peter acknowledges that this unblocks them and decides to tag the fix for Alpha 4.
actions: Peter: Tag the fix for Alpha 4
decisions: The hotfix is successful and ready for Alpha 4 release.
segments.retrieval_summary: Confirm successful deployment of duplicate symbol hotfix; Peter to tag for `alpha_4` release.
